brand.name: JustSwap
brand.slogan: Exchange what you have for what you need

type.swap_confirm_pending: {name} confirmed the swap — confirm your side
type.swap_disputed: {name} reported a problem with your swap

common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

states.errorBody: Something unexpected happened. Check your connection and try again.

notFound.title: This page is no longer available
notFound.description: The listing may have been removed, completed, or linked incorrectly. Browse current listings instead.

home.heroTitle: Exchange what you have for what you need
home.heroSubtitle: JustSwap helps people trade items directly with each other. No buying, no selling, just clear offers and community exchange.
home.heroBadge: A marketplace built for direct exchange
home.heroTrustNote: Add listing is available after sign-in so every listing is tied to a real account.
home.heroPreviewTrust: Browse real listings from the marketplace.
home.heroPreviewSafety: Agree on the final handover directly with the other user.
home.categoriesDescription: Start from a category and find items people are ready to exchange.
home.featuredDescription: Highlighted listings come from the live database. If none are featured yet, we show an empty state instead of sample items.
home.featuredEmptyHint: Feature real listings from the database or add the first listing to start the marketplace.
home.latestDescription: Recently published listings from the marketplace.
home.followingEmptyHint: Follow people to see their latest listings here.
home.emptyDescription: Be the first to list an item and tell the community what you want in exchange.

how.title: A simple way to swap directly
how.description: JustSwap keeps the marketplace focused on exchange, not buying or selling.
how.step1Body: Add photos, condition, location, and what you would like in return.
how.step2Body: Browse categories, search listings, and find people open to trading.
how.step3Body: Message the owner, agree on the exchange, and arrange the handover responsibly.

trust.title: Trust and safety are part of the experience
trust.description: The interface keeps responsibility clear while helping users make informed decisions before they meet or exchange items.
trust.item1Body: Condition, photos, location, and wanted-exchange details are visible before users start a conversation.
trust.item2Body: Users agree with each other. JustSwap does not buy, sell, own, or complete swaps.
trust.item3Body: Users are encouraged to meet in public places and inspect items before completing an exchange.

home.ctaTitle: Give unused items a second life
home.ctaDescription: List what you have or browse the marketplace to find someone who wants to trade.

newListing.title: Add New Listing
newListing.fieldWanted: What do you want in exchange?
newListing.imagesHint: Up to {max} images on the free plan

editListing.title: Edit listing
editListing.saveError: Couldn't save your changes. Please try again.
editListing.deleteConfirm: Delete this listing? This can't be undone.
editListing.imageError: Couldn't update images. Please try again.
editListing.imagesNeedApi: Image editing needs the backend API.

auth.errorGeneric: Something went wrong, please try again
auth.forgotHint: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
auth.forgotSent: If that email is registered, a reset link is on its way. Check your inbox.
auth.resetError: Couldn't update your password. Please try again.
auth.resetExpired: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
auth.confirmEmailBody: We've sent a confirmation link to your email. Tap it to activate your account.
auth.linkExpired: That link is invalid or has expired. Please sign in or request a new one.

onboarding.title: Welcome to JustSwap
onboarding.subtitle: Set up your profile so others can trust your swaps.
onboarding.error: Couldn't save your profile. Please try again.
onboarding.avatarType: Please choose a JPG, PNG, or WebP image.
onboarding.avatarSize: That image is too large (max 5 MB).

chat.title: Messages
chat.disclaimerBeforeChat: JustSwap is only a communication platform. The agreement and item handover are the users' responsibility.
chat.reminder: Reminder: the agreement and handover are your responsibility. Don't share sensitive data.

report.title: Report Issue
report.success: Your report was received, thank you

proposal.title: Propose a swap
proposal.chooseItemsHint: Pick one or more of your items
proposal.notePlaceholder: Introduce yourself or explain the swap…
proposal.error: Couldn't complete that. Please try again.
proposal.noListings: You have no items to offer yet
proposal.noListingsHint: Create a listing first, then propose a swap.
proposal.agreed: You both agreed! Arrange the handover safely and meet in a public place.
proposal.awaitingConfirmation: Waiting for both sides to confirm the handover.
proposal.counterHint: Re-select which of the proposer's items are on the table.
proposal.confirmHint: Upload a photo of the item you received to confirm your side. When both of you confirm, the swap is complete.
proposal.uploadError: Photo upload failed. Please try again.
proposal.awaitingYou: It's your turn — confirm you received your item.
proposal.awaitingOther: Waiting for {name} to confirm they received their item.
proposal.disputeHint: Tell us what happened. An admin will review it — neither item changes hands in the app.
proposal.disputedNote: An admin is reviewing this swap.
proposal.completeBody: Nice swap — your completed-swaps count just went up.
proposal.rateError: Couldn't save your rating. Please try again.

points.noOwn: JustSwap does not own the listed items.
points.noGuarantee: JustSwap does not guarantee that exchanges are completed.
points.noEscrow: JustSwap does not directly complete, manage, escrow, or mediate swap transactions.
points.noCondition: JustSwap does not guarantee the condition of any listed item.
points.userResponsibility: The final agreement and item handover are the responsibility of the users.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro: These terms describe the basic rules for using JustSwap.
terms.marketplace: JustSwap is a listing and communication marketplace for direct item exchange. It is not a buying, selling, payment, delivery, escrow, or ownership-transfer service.
terms.conduct: Users are responsible for posting accurate listings, communicating respectfully, and complying with applicable laws.
terms.handover: Users are responsible for inspecting items, agreeing on terms, and arranging any handover directly with each other.

warn.title: Warn user
warn.placeholder: Write a warning to this user…

suspend.title: Suspend user
suspend.reasonPlaceholder: Why is this account being suspended?

ban.unbanConfirm: Lift the ban on this user?

message.title: Send a message
message.placeholder: Write a message to this user…

login.title: Admin sign-in
login.subtitle: Authorized administrators only
login.notAdmin: This account is not an administrator

legal.disclaimerIntro: JustSwap is a marketplace for people to discover exchange opportunities and communicate. The platform does not own listed items or complete exchanges for users.

footer.description: JustSwap is a consumer marketplace for direct item exchange. List what you have, find what you need, and arrange swaps directly with other people.
footer.note: No buying. No selling. Direct exchange only.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: JustSwap uses account, listing, message, and marketplace activity data to operate the service and keep user-facing features working.
privacy.data: Do not share sensitive personal information in public listings. Messages and reports may be reviewed when needed for safety, support, or moderation.
privacy.contact: For privacy or support questions, contact support@justswap.app.
